caption: A person's hands hold a box of "Topps CLEARLY AUTHENTIC 2020" baseball cards, which features a picture of Aaron Judge in a New York Yankees uniform. The box states, "ONE ENCASED AUTOGRAPHED ACETATE CARD PER BOX." The person's fingers are positioned to open the box, and their movement is visible as they slide a portion of the packaging. In the background, a screen displays a man wearing a black t-shirt, positioned behind a "CASEBREAKS" logo and "CASPYS" text. A small inset window shows another view of the card box, accompanied by the website "CASEBREAKHEAD.COM". The scene remains consistent in location and setting throughout the sequence, with the primary focus on the physical interaction of opening the product while the background broadcast remains static.
